overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through Night City on a sunny day. The player character moves from an urban street with a distinctive geometric skyscraper, under an elevated highway past billboards and a diner, to an industrial waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with elevated highway and crosswalk

events.description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians
slight left turn to align with crosswalk direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and stepping onto the crosswalk to cross the street

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: large light blue industrial tank with white base
distinctive tall building with gold and red geometric diagonal patterns
massive concrete highway overpass casting shadows on the street
white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a sunny urban sidewalk next to a street, with a massive elevated highway overpass on the left and a distinctive geometric skyscraper dominating the center background. The camera walks forward and crosses a marked crosswalk with other pedestrians, passing a blue industrial tank on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with large digital advertisements

events.description: entering the shadowed area beneath the elevated highway overpass
turning left to follow the path under the overpass

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking under the elevated highway, passing large billboards

notable_agents.action: walking ahead under the overpass wearing casual clothing

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen showing promotional content with red background
low-rise yellow and green building with signage, partially visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the massive concrete overpass into a semi-covered area with mixed lighting. A large digital billboard appears on the left displaying advertisements, while the geometric skyscraper shifts to the right background. The path turns left, leading deeper under the highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial eatery with outdoor seating under overpass

events.description: passing outdoor dining area with green umbrellas and seated patrons

agents.ego_description: walking past a diner with outdoor seating, continuing under the overpass toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor tables under green umbrellas

entered.detail: green patio umbrellas with blue plastic chairs arranged outside the yellow building
yellow and silver industrial piping running along the waterfront structures

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the camera passes a yellow commercial building with outdoor seating featuring green umbrellas where people are sitting. The environment transitions from commercial to industrial as the path approaches the waterfront, with industrial piping becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial waterfront with factories and storage facilities

events.description: emerging from under the overpass into open waterfront industrial area
view opens up to reveal water canal and industrial buildings across the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade observing the industrial buildings across the water

entered.detail: murky green waterway separating the walkway from the industrial district
large red-brick industrial structure with multiple levels and signage on top
green elevated monorail or transit track running across the scene

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into a wide-open industrial waterfront area. The scene opens up to reveal a water canal with industrial buildings on the far side, including a prominent red-brick factory structure. An elevated transit rail runs overhead, and the geometric skyscraper from earlier is now visible in the far left background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright urban sidewalk into a shaded underpass that eventually opens onto an industrial waterfront. It begins by walking across a sunny crosswalk beside a blue industrial tank, with a massive geometric skyscraper dominating the skyline. As the camera moves under a concrete highway overpass, the lighting shifts to a semi-covered gloom where digital billboards flicker on the left and the path turns deeper into the structure. The scene then transitions past a yellow commercial building with green umbrellas, moving away from the city center as industrial piping begins to appear in the distance. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into a wide-open waterfront area, revealing a water canal and red-brick factories beneath an elevated transit rail.
